title: Hybrid solution to ensure energy self-sufficiency in a berry farm
description: A berry farm in eastern Finland implemented a hybrid renewable energy solution combining a 30 kW solar PV system and a 110 kW wood gasification unit for on-site power and heat production. The system optimises seasonal energy use for berry freezing and drying, ensures self-sufficiency, and allows selling around 60 MWh of surplus electricity to the grid.
